---
title: "🗂️ Upload File"
description: "Already have an image or file you want to use? With Upload File, you can bring existing visuals into DOT to annotate, edit, or share them with your team. It’s a quick way to keep all your screenshots, images, and docs in one place."
navigation: true

### How to Use Upload File

1. Open the quick capture bar.

2. Click the Upload icon to start the process.

3. A file browser window will open—simply choose the image or document you want to upload.

4. Once selected, your file will appear as a new Dot where you can annotate, comment, or start a thread.


<template>
  <div class="border rounded-lg shadow-md mt-4 h-60">
    <iframe src="/quickstart-capture.png" class="rounded-lg w-full h-full" scrolling="no" frameborder="0"></iframe>

  </div>
</template>

### 💡 Tips

* Add short explanations or steps to give your uploaded file more context.

* Ideal when you already have screenshots or documents saved on your device.

* Upload allows you to centralize all your visuals inside DOT for easy access.
